summary: Added DB command p95/source to the real backend latency breakdown model.
Changed the component timing panel to display run-wide diagnostics aggregate DB command p95 instead of only the latest diagnostics sample.

validations.command: npm test -- --run src/test/load-test-dashboard.test.ts -t "keeps DB command p95"

risks: DB command p95 is still run-level, not per-target attribution.
If diagnostics collection is disabled, the metric remains unavailable by design.
recommendation: Promote through dev/main, rerun real backend load test, then choose the next structural performance slice based on client/app/db timing comparison.
